abilities.name: Found Fortune
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model resolves a Walk action, it may remove a Scheme marker within 2" to draw a card.

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Shootout
abilities.text: After this model uses the Quick Getaway ability, it deals 2 damage to the attacker.

actions.name: Six-Shooters
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of "(melee) 1" or "(gun) 10".

triggers.name: Drop It!
triggers.text: Target may discard a card. If it does not, make a Scheme marker in base contact with it.

actions.name: "Scatter! Law's Comin'!"
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. This model and up to two other allies within range move up to 5", ignoring vertical distance.

triggers.name: Eagle-Eyed Search
triggers.text: Once per activation. Draw two cards and then discard a card.

triggers.name: "Don't Drop the Loot!"
triggers.text: Remove a Scheme marker within 1" of one of the moved models to infuse a (t).

triggers.name: Bandit Raid
triggers.text: After resolving, one model moved this way may declare an attack action.

actions.name: Ransack
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a Scheme marker. An ally within 10" of the target may declare the Interact action, ignoring engagement. Then, remove the target.
